summary:
Claim: Nickel titanium (NiTi) is the most elastic among the options.  
Evidence: - NiTi exhibits superelasticity through reversible phase transformations (austenite ↔ martensite), allowing large strains (~8–10%) without permanent deformation. - Pure titanium forms (α or β) show limited recoverable strain and no such phase change capability.  
Answer: D
